_meta.description: Claude Code persistent memory system registry.

memory_system.description: File-based persistent memory that survives across conversations. MEMORY.md is always loaded into context.

memory_md.format: Markdown with section headings and entry links
constraints: Is an INDEX, not content — never write memory directly into MEMORY.md
Organize semantically by topic, not chronologically

description.description: Used to decide relevance in future conversations

user.description: Information about the user's role, goals, responsibilities, knowledge
user.when_to_save: When you learn details about the user's role, preferences, expertise
user.how_to_use: Tailor behavior to user's profile and perspective
user.body_structure: Facts about the user, organized by relevance

feedback.description: Corrections and confirmations about approach — what to avoid/repeat
feedback.when_to_save: When user corrects approach OR confirms non-obvious approach worked
feedback.how_to_use: Guide behavior so user doesn't need to give same guidance twice

project.description: Ongoing work state, goals, initiatives, decisions
project.when_to_save: When you learn who/what/why/when about ongoing work
project.how_to_use: Understand context and motivation behind user's requests

reference.description: Pointers to external resources, dashboards, tracking systems
reference.when_to_save: When you learn about resources in external systems
reference.how_to_use: Know where to look for information outside the project
reference.body_structure: Resource name, location, purpose, access details

learning_loop.description: The most powerful memory pattern — environment gets smarter with use
stages: OBSERVE: Track patterns during normal operation
EXTRACT: On session end or skill completion, write patterns to memory
APPLY: Subsequent sessions read patterns to inform decisions
FEEDBACK: User corrections refine the patterns

implementation.extract_via: Stop hook or skill completion step
implementation.apply_via: Memory read at session start or on-demand query
implementation.feedback_via: User corrections saved as feedback-type memories

what_not_to_save: Code patterns derivable from reading current code
Git history — use git log / git blame
Debugging solutions — fix is in the code, context in commit message
Ephemeral task details / current conversation context
